texto: Annie's message is timeless, her shining spirit and healing gift from the Spiritual Universe will capture your heart. She was born with birth defects in a time when special children and their mothers were put to death or banished. But have things changed really that much? Have they changed enough? "No!" Bullying, abuse, ridicule, and inequality thrives in the lives of women and children in our global modern society, just as surely as it did in the mid-1600s Colonial America. Based on factual research.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Deborah A.Bowman que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Annie's message is timeless, her shining spirit and healing gift from the Spiritual Universe will…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, birth-defects, colonial-america, com foco em luto e mudanca.
